content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Redstone Energy
Customer ID: C007
Contract ID: K008
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Call Type: Mid-Year Check-in
Date: March 12, 2024
Participants: Sarah Chen (AE), Paula Graves (IT Director)

Sarah Chen: Paula, good to connect. We're about six months into the second year. How's the team finding the platform?

Paula Graves: Honestly, Sarah, things have been a bit unsettled here. We had a leadership change in IT — we have a new CTO who joined in January, Marcus Webb. He's been doing a full audit of our software stack.

Sarah Chen: I appreciate the heads up. Has your team's day-to-day use of DataSync Pro been affected?

Paula Graves: Not yet. My team is still using it and it's been fine. But I'll be transparent with you — Marcus came from a company that used FieldOps Suite and he's been asking questions about consolidating onto platforms he's already familiar with.

Sarah Chen: I see. Would it be helpful if I requested a meeting with Marcus directly? I'd like to make the case for DataSync Pro and understand his concerns firsthand.

Paula Graves: I think that would be a good idea. I'll be honest, I can advocate for the platform but I don't have the budget authority anymore — Marcus controls that now. Let me broker an introduction.

Sarah Chen: I'd really appreciate that, Paula. Can you make that happen in the next two weeks?

Paula Graves: I'll try. No guarantees on his calendar but I'll do my best.
